item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Samurai's Journey IV
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's continuing path to becoming a realm-renowned samurai─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level samurai to 90 and complete all job quests and melee DPS role quests up through “To Calmer Seas.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
